experience.title: Manager - Information Technology and Building Automation Systems
experience.description: Led a cross-functional team of engineers, QAs and UX designers to develop features and fix product defects. Delivered detailed feature roadmaps that included action items and project targets. Leveraged in-depth understanding of end-to-end customer experience to identify pain points and latent customer needs. Managed the 8-person local IT team, allocating resources to ongoing projects and enforcing deadlines.

experience.title: Information Systems Technician
experience.description: Utilized IT expertise to support communications efforts in Operation Iraqi Freedom and Operation New Dawn, focusing on network security, Microsoft-based programs, and the installation and maintenance of affiliated hardware.

current_role: Manager - Information Technology and Building Automation Systems
